name: hunter-domain-contacts
description: Find public B2B contact candidates for a target company domain, including confidence, department, title, and source counts.
business_value: Outbound sales enrichment and account research.

inputs.name: department
inputs.note: Optional department filter such as sales, marketing, executive, or engineering.

auth.note: Never commit raw contact exports with personal data unless intentionally redacted.

verification_result: Example fixture validates domain contact rows with redacted emails and confidence fields.
known_risks: Contact data must be handled under applicable privacy and outreach laws.
Confidence scores are not guarantees of deliverability or buying intent.
